headline: 1 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks to Consider Right Now and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: BSX vs. ABT: Which Medical Stock Has More Upside Potential?
summary: Boston Scientific and Abbott both posted solid quarterly growth, but analysts see stronger upside for Boston Scientific despite mounting operational pressures.

headline: Wolfe Research cuts Boston Scientific rating as key growth drivers falter
summary: Investing.com -- Wolfe Research downgraded Boston Scientific to Peer Perform in a note on Friday, declaring the end of a multiyear bullish thesis on the medical device company after its two key growth engines (pulsed field ablation and the Watchman left atrial appendage closure device) stalled sharply in the first half of 2026.

headline: Our Boston Scientific Pick Has Suffered. We’re Pulling the Recommendation.
summary: Boston Scientific  stock has more questions than answers.  Shares of the medical device maker dropped have about 14% this week to about $49 after management said growth of its Watchman product, an implant that reduces the risk of stroke in patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation (AFib), is slowing.  The company stood by its financial guidance, but the market clearly has larger concerns.
